chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 406 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 27.11.2023 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Bhatt, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned DPG submits that this case is fixed before the trial Court on 04.12.2023, and on the same date, prosecution will produce the witnesses. In view of above, learned Counsel for applicant does not press this application and seeks directions for the trial Court to expedite the trial and examine the material witnesses within a period of one month. Learned DPG has recorded no objection to this proposition. Accordingly, this application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the trial Court is directed to examine the material witnesses within a period of one month. After that period, in any case, applicant would be at liberty to file a fresh application for bail, which shall be decided in accordance with law on its own merits, independent of the previous orders including this one. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
